description: Initialize packages/llm with package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, and install dependencies
result: Created packages/llm with ai@6.0.116, @ai-sdk/anthropic@3.0.58, zod, typescript, vitest, tsx. Upgraded from ai@5 to ai@6 based on research-01.

description: Verify Vercel AI SDK v5+ API surface for generateText with tool calling and Anthropic provider
result: AI SDK is at v6. Key changes: inputSchema (not parameters), stopWhen: stepCountIs(N) (not maxSteps), default stepCountIs(1) means no auto-looping. Tool calls use .input (not .args). ToolResultPart needs toolName + output:{type:'text',value:string}.

description: Implement core types: Message, ToolCall, ToolResult, TokenUsage, AgentResult
result: src/types.ts with all 5 types, JSDoc documented, JSON-serializable. AgentResult.trace typed as Trace.

description: Implement trace types: Trace, Round, ToolExecution, TraceEvent, TraceCollector
result: src/trace/events.ts with all trace types. src/trace/index.ts with createTrace(model, provider, opts) helper. Enhanced with system prompt capture, config.maxRounds, finishReason, rawResponse per red-team.

description: Implement defineTool() with Zod schema inference and ToolRegistry
result: src/tool/index.ts with ToolDefinition<T>, defineTool(), createToolRegistry() using AI SDK v6 inputSchema.

description: Implement Anthropic provider wrapping Vercel AI SDK
result: src/provider/base.ts (Provider interface), src/provider/anthropic.ts (AnthropicProvider with API key leak guards), src/provider/index.ts (resolveProvider). Uses AI SDK v6 API.

description: Implement core agent loop with trace emission
result: src/agent/loop.ts with full agent loop, trace emission, maxRounds validation (cap 100), clampUsage, unknown tool handling, forced final call on maxRounds exhaustion.

description: Wire up public API exports in index.ts
result: src/index.ts exports agent, defineTool, createTrace, LLMError + all types. src/errors.ts with LLMError class.

description: Unit tests for agent loop with mocked provider
result: test/agent-loop.test.ts with 8 test cases, all passing. Mock provider, covers no-tools, single/multi tool calls, maxRounds, errors, trace events, usage accumulation, JSON serialization.

description: Integration test script with real Anthropic API call
result: test/integration.ts standalone script. Defines calculate tool, runs against claude-haiku-4.5, logs trace events, prints full JSON trace. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

description: Red team: API key exposure and injection attacks
result: Fixed: API key leak guards (toJSON/toString/inspect) on AnthropicProvider. maxRounds DoS guard (cap 100, validate finite+positive). Unknown tool names handled gracefully. Prompt injection documented as inherent risk. No prototype pollution found.

description: Red team: Type safety and data integrity
result: Fixed: clampUsage() for non-negative integers. Tool execute() null/undefined coercion. Non-Error throw handling. Empty response fallback to '[empty response]'. Verified: timestamps correct, messages immutable, cost math correct, crypto.randomUUID for trace id.

Fixed: Added finishReason + rawResponse to ProviderCallResult and Round.response. System prompt + maxRounds captured in Trace. Verified: Date.now() consistent, TraceCollector synchronous, traces comparable across runs.
